fields.name: Length #Length of illumination animation in seconds.
Next State #Used to automatically transition to another state when finished.
Intensity #Animates intensity over time. 0 - Min Intensity.  1 - Max Intensity
Color #Animates color over time.  0 - White.  1 - Full Color
Activation #Animates On/Off state over time. 0 - Off. 1 - On
